codepipeline.customactiontype.Category.Docs: The category of the custom action, such as a build action or a test action.
codepipeline.customactiontype.Category.Allowed values: Approval | Build | Deploy | Invoke | Source | Test

codepipeline.customactiontype.Configurat.Docs: The configuration properties for the custom action.  You can refer to a name in the configuration properties of the custom action within the URL templates by following the format of {Config:name}, as long as the configuration property is both required and not secret. For more information, see [Create a Custom Action for a Pipeline](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/codepipeline/latest/userguide/how-to-create-custom-action.html).

codepipeline.customactiontype.InputArtif.Docs: The details of the input artifact for the action, such as its commit ID.

codepipeline.customactiontype.OutputArti.Docs: The details of the output artifact of the action, such as its commit ID.

codepipeline.customactiontype.Provider.Docs: The provider of the service used in the custom action, such as CodeDeploy.

codepipeline.customactiontype.Settings.Docs: URLs that provide users information about this custom action.

codepipeline.customactiontype.Tags.Docs: The tags for the custom action.

codepipeline.customactiontype.Version.Docs: The version identifier of the custom action.
